name: Tony's Summer Pasta
recipeIngredient: 6 medium to 8 fresh roma tomatoes, chopped
1 pound mozzarella cheese (regular or light), grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions.
2. Combine all ingredients except pasta in a bowl and let sit at room temperature.
3. Toss with hot cooked pasta. It may be necessary to microwave the tossed pasta for 2 to 3 minutes so cheese will melt slightly and ingredients will combine better.
4. Makes approximately six 2-cup servings.
